title: Loki and the Holy Knights
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Nami, Giants as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's soooo tasty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This Moose reminds me of dinosaur meat!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're quite tricky to catch! As Ferocious as they are delicious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I appreciate it!! Hajrudin!! Stansen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Diga GA! Glad you like it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's rare for humans to make it all the way to the sun realm.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Most confuse the underworld for Elbaf proper and flee before they find their way up here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up! The mighty oars was a warrior legendary even to you giants!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'd tower over any of you three times over! And guess who finally finished him? That's right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It was me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Woooo!! Way to go, Cap'n usop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wow, your skin really is blue!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should see fishman Island. There's as many skin tones as there are fish in the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've always wanted to see a mermaid!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No shame in that! They're a sight to behold! Mermaid core is more enticing than heaven itself!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Woooah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That said...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My heart scars just as much when I see you giant ladies!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, Sanji-Run, you're so silly! It's cute!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Woohoo!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Beauties everywhere I look! I'm getting buried in Babes!! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And what are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who? Me???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can answer with my own blues!! My *what the heck am I* Dittyj yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess it's a big wilde world out there!! Let's toast to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm surprised so many giants have never gone out to sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I kind of assumed they were all pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hurr!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: gyaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami-Taso... I WADDA apologize to ya and dis under straw hat 'bout before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He ain't gonna be forgiven that easily, but beating a proper apology out of him was the least we could do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GORD-TASO'S SADISTIC SIDE REALLY MAKES MY HEART FLUTTER!!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't sweat it. It's not like anyone died.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Although, that's only 'cause usopp stopped me...

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
